title: Warhammer: Sons of the Empire
body:
Armor and Weapons from the world of Warhammer Fantasy!

This mod currently includes armor for 6 Factions with updates to the current factions and brand-new ones being planned!

Melee weapons, banners, and guns are included with more coming soon!

**The Empire of Man**
![Imperial Army](https://i.imgur.com/bzZ9ath.jpeg)
**The Kingdom of Bretonnia**
![King Louens Retinue](https://i.imgur.com/Dv4oKHr.jpeg)
**The Tzardom of Kislev**
![Kislev Force](https://i.imgur.com/wFjtyLq.jpg)
**The Southern Realms**
![Estalian Company](https://i.imgur.com/Dn2dQ5q.jpeg)
**The Karaz Ankor**
![The High King](https://i.imgur.com/KNrk9Ke.png)
**The High Elf Realms**
![High Elf Army](https://i.imgur.com/B5uDhLa.jpeg)

(Any weapons shown are from Epic Knights)

I highly recommend using the following mods for the best experience.
- Villager Recruits (change the config to turn them into human models it works best for the helmets)
- Epic Knights and its addons for weapons and decorations
- ewewukek's Musket Mod

Just a reminder if a certain armor set is "missing" something such as a helmet, boots, or leggings there is always something already in to match it.
Examples: All of the state troopers share a helmet and boots. Most factions share boots to try and minimize the recipes such as Dawi heavy boots or Elven boots.
There are also many alternate versions to mix and match so have fun with it!
